zh.lifeSummary: 當John Southwell於大約1535年出生在英國素福爾可巴哈姆時，他的父親John Southwell30歲，母親Elizabeth Foster26歲。他於大約1565年與Margaret Croftes結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世在英國英格蘭素福爾可巴哈姆，埋葬在英國素福爾可巴哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Southwell于大约1535年出生在英国素福爾可巴哈姆时，他的父亲John Southwell30岁，母亲Elizabeth Foster26岁。他于大约1565年与Margaret Croftes结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世在英国英格兰素福爾可巴哈姆，埋葬在英国素福爾可巴哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Southwell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from Middle English south ‘south’ + wel(le) ‘well, pool, spring’ (Old English sūth + wella). The surname may be topographic, for someone who lived ‘by the south well’ or ‘south of the well’, or habitational, from a place so named, such as Southwell (Nottinghamshire) or Southwell on the Isle of Portland (Dorset).
in Yorkshire and Lancashire, often a hypercorrect form of Soothill, a habitational name from Soothill in Dewsbury (Yorkshire), from Old English sōt ‘soot’ + hyll ‘hill’.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When John Southwell was born about 1535, in Barham, Suffolk, England, his father, John Southwell, was 30 and his mother, Elizabeth Foster, was 26. He married Margaret Croftes about 1565. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 6 daughters. He died in Barham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Barham, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Southwell est né environ 1535, à Barham, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, John Southwell, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Foster, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Croftes environ 1565. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé à Barham, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterré à Barham, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Southwell um 1535 in Barham, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Southwell 30 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Foster 26. Er hat um 1565 Margaret Croftes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb in Barham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Barham, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Southwell è nato il circa 1535 nel Barham, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, John Southwell, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Foster, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Croftes circa 1565. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 6 figlie. Morì nel Barham, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolto a Barham, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Southwellが約1535年にイギリススフォルクバーハムで生まれた時，父John Southwellは30歳，母Elizabeth Fosterは26歳であった。約1565年にMargaret Croftesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼はイギリスイギリススフォルクバーハムで死去し，イギリススフォルクバーハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Southwell(이)가 대략 1535년 영국 수폴크 바람에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Southwell(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Foster(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1565년 Margaret Croftes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 바람에서 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 바람에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Southwell nasceu aproximadamente 1535, em Barham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Southwell, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Foster, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Croftes aproximadamente 1565. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em Barham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultado em Barham, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Southwell родился около 1535 г. в местности барам, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени John Southwell было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Foster, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Croftes около 1565 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей. Он умер в местности барам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания и был похоронен в местности барам, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Southwell nació aproximadamente 1535, en Barham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, John Southwell, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Foster, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Margaret Croftes aproximadamente 1565. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió en Barham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, y fue sepultado en Barham, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
